lesson.menu_desc: Goals and the future: plans, predictions and ambitions (will / going to) -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Talking About Goals & the Future (will / going to / future plans)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcos Mansour | Aula 16 -- Talking About Goals & the Future

listenings.text: Let me share my five-year plan. In the short term, this year, I am going to finish the international certification in valuation. Next year, I am going to lead two cross-border projects with partners in Europe. By the end of the year, I will probably present at the regional congress for the first time. In about three years, I am going to run as a candidate for the UPAV board. My long-term goal is clear: in five years, I will pursue the presidency of the association. I know it is ambitious, but I am going to work hard and stay focused. Step by step, I am going to turn this vision into reality.

Hi Marcos, this is Beatriz from the program committee. I am calling about an exciting future project. Next spring, we are going to launch an international working group on valuation standards, and we would love you to lead it. The first meeting will be in March, and we will travel to three countries during the year. I think this is a great step toward your long-term goals, and it fits your ambition perfectly. We are going to send you the full proposal by email this week. Please take a look and let me know if you want to pursue it. I really hope you will say yes. Talk soon.
